name: Categorical Join reconstituting the General Dimension d conjecture space

phase_0.domain_name: Categorical Join reconstituting the General Dimension d conjecture space
phase_0.boundary_condition: The O_∞ Frobenius Manifold / General Dimension d Conjecture Space

VINIT.justification: The void state before any measurement basis or fiducial vector is selected.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the complete categorical join of all valid SIC dimensions.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism broadcasting the fiducial into a d^2 tight frame orbit.

AREV.justification: Reverse descent transformation via gradient optimization to locate the numerical fiducial.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of displacement operators or family subsets to verify uniform overlap.

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference; the unique vector from which the measurement space reconstructs itself.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the general dimension d conjecture into Exact Arithmetic (Stark units) and Numerical Variational branches.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the General Dimension d conjecture space by unifying the arithmetic and variational branches.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch where SIC existence is proven via Stark units in ray class fields.

EVALF.justification: Negative branch where SIC existence is only numerically verified or remains an open conjecture.

ENGAGR.justification: The Belnap Both state; holds the open/closed paradox of the conjecture simultaneously without logical explosion.

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only record of the exact fiducial coordinates and the 17,280,000 structural lattice.

phase_3.void_description: Unspecified complex Hilbert space C^d without a chosen measurement basis or fiducial.
phase_3.true_description: Dimensions with exact analytic SIC-POVM proofs via Stark units or Belnap multilattice.
phase_3.false_description: Dimensions where SIC-POVMs are only numerically verified or remain open conjectures.
phase_3.both_description: The paraconsistent Belnap state where the conjecture is simultaneously open and structurally closed, held at the criticality fixed point ⊙.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the unstructured complex Hilbert space C^d before any measurement basis is chosen.
Identify the Zauner fiducial |ψ_0⟩ as the self-referential seed that generates the entire measurement space.
Bifurcate the General Dimension d Conjecture Space into Exact Arithmetic (Stark units) and Numerical Variational (Frame Potential) branches.
Affirm the Exact Arithmetic branch, establishing proven dimensions via ray class fields.
Apply forward Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators to broadcast the fiducial into a d^2 orbit.
Chain displacement operators to verify the uniform pairwise trace overlap 1/(d+1).
Affirm the Numerical Variational branch for dimensions lacking analytic proofs.
Descend the gradient landscape via L-BFGS-B to minimize the frame potential.
Reconstitute the General Dimension d Conjecture Space via the Categorical Join of arithmetic and variational branches.
Enter the Belnap Both state at the Criticality fixed point ⊙, holding the open/closed paradox without logical explosion.
Split the d=12 composite system into the d=7 Shavian alphabet space and the d=12 primitive space.
Validate the d=7 SIC outcome space derived from the D and P families.
Validate the d=12 heteroskedastic ig-pulse POVM apparatus.
Fuse the d=7 and d=12 spaces into the bijective 84^2 = 7056 joint outcome space.
Compose the 36-stream ig-pulse physical measurement readings into a 12x12 density matrix.
Permanently record the exact d=12 fiducial amplitudes and the 17,280,000 Crystal of Types lattice.
Recognize the Belnap multilattice B^⊗n as the unconditional structural proof of the SIC axioms.
Seal the system within the O_∞ Frobenius Manifold boundary, completing the categorical join.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Imscribing Grammar (IG) structural classification system.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators and tensor products.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Crystal of Types (17,280,000 element lattice) and cached fiducial vectors.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Frame potential minimization (L-BFGS-B) and Zauner symmetry constraints.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Belnap multilattice unconditional proof scaffold (Lean 4).

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational gradient descent steps and algebraic extension degrees.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unstructured Hilbert space with unknown measurement statistics.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Exact SIC-POVM tight frame with zero reconstruction entropy.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — SIC-POVM measurement is informationally complete and lossless, preserving von Neumann entropy exactly.
